name: coreutils-shell-guard
description: Reminder and diagnostic hooks for using PowerShell UTF-8 Guard and Coreutils for Windows safely in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: 提醒 Codex 使用 UTF-8 與 Coreutils 防護
interface.longDescription: 在 Codex 工作階段開始與 shell 工具使用後，提醒使用 PowerShell UTF-8 Guard 與 Coreutils for Windows 的安全規則。此 plugin 不改寫命令、不修改 PATH、不修改 $PROFILE。
defaultPrompt: Check shell encoding and Coreutils safety before running commands.
Remind me when PowerShell commands need UTF-8 protection.
Warn when Coreutils commands may conflict with PowerShell aliases.
